title: The Tipped Daggers Mod
description: A mod thats add daggers that are made of wold, iron, gold, diamond, netherite and can be tipped with wither and other very potion effects
body:
This mod is only on Modrinth. Please do not distrobute to other 3rd party Website without my promisson. If you see my mod on Curseforge, and other sus websites. please report it to me in my discord and ty for reading the description. but who would copy me lol.

omg downloads ty ty!!!
(goal: 445/1000)

# Features

Only Has The daggers made of wood, iron, gold, diamond, netherite, Enderite. Currently the mod has Wither, Poison, Weakness as a effect for a dagger.

## Whats Next?

- idk prob villager update and effect. Update: TBH not sure when next update (12/1/25)

## Current State of the mod

- Currently in the mod it has, The Dagger Dealer which is a villager that sell daggers, 2 Effects which is poison, Wither, Weakness. Wither bottle, Enderite Tools, Throwing Daggers + glove, item reqired to make the tipped daggers is Binding Agent, And da new things this update will add is soap and a scrub daddy to get the effect off the dagger.

# How to craft  
### 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

*tbh just use jei or any recipe viewer*

</details>


### How to craft the Binding Agent

- You Will Need to Craft Binding Agent To Add The Effect you want to the dagger, check gallery for the recipe.

### How to craft the diffrent tipped daggers

- To Craft a tipped dagger make and put the Binding agent to the templet spot then in the middle put the dagger you want to upgrade then put wither rose(Wither effect) or spider eye (Poison effect) or Fermented Spider eye (Weakness Effect) and good job you made a Dagger tipped with the effect of your chosen effect.

## Enderite Things

### Enderite Armor/tool
 To get Enderite Armor/tool You need a Smithing block, Amethist shard, the netherite tool/armor and a Enderite Ingot.

 ![Exsaple of upgrade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a198f799956ac41ea5bc2b1eab9c3dc5c156d63d.png)

###   Enderite Glob 
whitch is the thing before the ingot. You will need a raw enderite, Netherite Ingot, Gold Ingot, Iron Ingot, Diamond like so then SMELT In a blast or normal furnest.
 
 ![Glob Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b36d1322ae403634f20015a7015327f02301715a.png)

 ![Smelting Glob](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c19dbfdf2b0e44e761435821c45e70396aa3c44b.png)
